answer_mismatch_examples.decoded_preview: Rob Furlong is a retired Canadian sniper who holds the record for the longest confirmed sniper kill in history. He was born on July 1, 1976, in Newfoundland, Canada, and grew up in a military family. Furlong joined the Canadian Armed Forces
answer_mismatch_examples.expected_preview: Rob Furlong is a retired Canadian sniper who holds the record for the longest confirmed sniper kill in history. He was born on July 1, 1976, in Newfoundland, Canada, and grew up in a military family. Furlong joined the Canadian Armed Forces

note: FActScore atomic fact text rarely appears verbatim in the generation. The adapter maps atomic labels to parent-sentence character spans; this script checks those spans against Llama tokenizer offsets.
